message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-7 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue storage cx-first sweep with 7 more hot-path siblings from
the callsite-count ranking:

1. `list_active_mutes_with_cx(cx, now_ms)` — 3+ callsites (mute
   enforcement dashboard / API read).
2. `get_action_undo_with_cx(cx, audit_action_id)` — 4+ callsites
   (undo bookkeeping read).
3. `purge_audit_actions_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 3+
   callsites (retention write).
4. `record_usage_metric_with_cx(cx, record)` — 4+ callsites
   (usage analytics write).
5. `count_segments_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 4+ callsites
   (retention-sweep read).
6. `count_audit_actions_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 4+
   callsites (retention-sweep read).
7. `count_usage_metrics_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 4+
   callsites (retention-sweep read).

All seven are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods.
Strictly additive.

Regression test `storage_tick119_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip` pins
the combined contract on a fresh DB — empty reads for counts +
list_active_mutes + get_action_undo (all return 0/empty/None),
record_usage_metric insert (verify id > 0), purge_audit_actions
on empty DB returns 0. Shutdown via shutdown_with_cx.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 480/480
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 28/140 methods. Running total
captures startup + top 25 business method callsites (~160 call
sites).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
